title: Actinostemon brachypodus

intro: Actinostemon brachypodus, commonly known as the "guanacastensis" or "Brazilian dragon tree," is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique, dragon-blood-red sap. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in treating various conditions, including wounds, infections, and skin irritations.
